ﬁeld QRS 101 Operating Manual Therapy with basic settings The QRS 101 Home System is th (A) Connect the power cable to the QRS 101 control device
(A) Connect the applicator cable to the QRS 101 control device magnetic ﬁeld system that emits 
homogeneous effective ﬁeld over body area. Connect the full-body applicator to the connector “Applicator A”. You can also
connect the pillow to the connector “Applicator B”. Note: It is not necessary to connect both applicators simultaneously. read more... Expert advice Are you interested in this prod We're happy to provide you with e
personalized advice. Do not hesit us: beratung@qrs-internation Phone: +423 / 392 42 01
Contact form QRS 101/310 accessorie QRS 101 Operating Man (1) Switch on the QRS device
(2) Select one of the three programs (3) Set the therapy duration
(4) Select the intensity Lie down on the mat, and if using the pillow, place it on the location to be treated.
(5) Start the therapy Therapy with individual settings The basic settings can only be changed when the device is switched on. Settings cannot be modiﬁed during the therapy. Setting the intensity from level 1 to 10 It may be a good idea to change the intensity if a targeted QRS therapy is to be
applied. Conditions > Back pain > Pain relief
> Stroke Furthermore, it is recommended that a higher intensity be used if you have installed
the QRS mat in bed, for example. If the QRS mat is located under the mattress you > Disorder Circulation
> Inﬂammation inhibition sleep on, the distance to the effect ﬁeld increases. The intensity should be increased
by one level for each 10 cm of mattress thickness. > Vegetativum Contraindications > Pregnancy > Epilepsy
> Severe hyperthyroidism > Severe cardiac arrhythmia
> Severe hypo- and hypertension https://qrs-international.com/qrs-101-operating-manual/?lang=en

QRS 101 Operating Manual | read more about how to set up the QRS 101 Homesystem device | QRS International AG (1) With the QRS device switched on, press and hold the intensity button for 2 seconds. A blinking intensity setting now appears on the display. Depending on whether you wish to increase or reduce the intensity, press (as
shown in the illustration) the left or right setting button. Conﬁrm the setting by pressing the A/B ok button between the setting buttons. The last value conﬁgured will remain saved. Modifying the therapy duration from 1 to 60 minutes It is recommended that the therapy time only be changed if you have the feeling that
it will be beneﬁcial for you. For example, sleep disorders can, among other things, be improved by increasing the therapy duration to 60 minutes. (1) With the QRS device switched on, press and hold one of the time selection
buttons for 2 seconds. A blinking time setting now appears on the display. Depending on whether you wish to increase or reduce the therapy time, press (as shown in the illustration) the left or right setting button. Conﬁrm the setting by pressing the A/B ok button. The last value conﬁgured will remain saved. Other functions For detailed instructions on using the other functions, please refer to the QRS 101
Operating Manual. https://qrs-international.com/qrs-101-operating-manual/?lang=en

28/08/2025, 09:09
QRS 101 Operating Manual | read more about how to set up the QRS 101 Homesystem device | QRS International AG (A) Switching between applicators If you have connected the mat and the pillow simultaneously, you can switch between the applicators using the A/B key. To do so, press the A/B key Press the right button (right arrow symbol) to switch to the applicator connector B
(pillow) Press the left button (left arrow symbol) to switch to the applicator connector A
(mat) Press the A/B button again to conﬁrm the connector selection (B) Switch display light on or off The illumination of the display can be turned off automatically by the device so that, for example, your sleep is not interrupted. Press the I/O button (left) with the light symbol to either activate or deactivate the automatic shutoff. (C) Conﬁgure automatic start of QRS therapy It may be a good idea to conﬁgure the automatic initiation of a therapy session if you
have installed the QRS mat in bed. You can conﬁgure 2 therapy starting points, e.g. in the morning before you wake up and at night when you go to bed. For information on conﬁguring the automatic start of therapy, please refer to the QRS 101 Operating Manual. (B) Switch sound on or off When the QRS therapy ends, a sound is played. This sound can be turned off so that, for example, your sleep is not interrupted. Press the I/O button (right) with the sound symbol to turn the sound emitted on or off when QRS therapy ends. Request original QRS manual The original QRS manual is provided with the QRS 101 Home System. If you do not have an original manual and require one, please contact us. News
Products
